nodes.name: Gut Dysbiosis
nodes.description: Imbalanced gut microbiome with loss of keystone species and pathobiont overgrowth

nodes.name: Leaky Gut (Intestinal Permeability)
nodes.description: Compromised intestinal barrier allowing LPS and antigens to enter systemic circulation
nodes.mechanism: Zonulin release → tight junction disruption → LPS translocation → TLR4 activation → systemic inflammation

nodes.name: Hormonal Imbalance
nodes.description: Androgen excess, estrogen deficiency, or progesterone dominance affecting skin

nodes.name: Insulin Resistance
nodes.description: Elevated insulin and IGF-1 stimulating sebum production and keratinocyte proliferation
nodes.mechanism: High insulin → IGF-1 elevation → sebocyte proliferation + androgen synthesis

nodes.name: Chronic Stress (HPA Dysregulation)
nodes.description: Sustained cortisol elevation causing collagen breakdown and barrier disruption
nodes.mechanism: Chronic stress → elevated cortisol → MMP upregulation + collagen suppression + barrier dysfunction

nodes.name: UV Radiation Damage
nodes.description: Chronic sun exposure causing DNA damage, photoaging, and immunosuppression
nodes.mechanism: UVA/UVB → ROS generation → DNA damage → collagen breakdown → immunosuppression

nodes.name: Genetic Predisposition
nodes.description: Inherited factors affecting skin barrier, immune response, and melanocyte activity
examples: MC1R variants (Red hair, increased skin cancer risk)

nodes.name: Nutrient Deficiency
nodes.description: Insufficient vitamins, minerals, or fatty acids required for skin health

nodes.name: Inflammation
nodes.description: Immune-mediated tissue response involving cytokines, immune cells, and vascular changes

nodes.name: Sebum Overproduction
nodes.description: Excessive sebaceous gland activity leading to oily skin and follicular congestion

nodes.name: Collagen Breakdown
nodes.description: Degradation of dermal collagen by matrix metalloproteinases

nodes.name: Barrier Dysfunction
nodes.description: Disruption of stratum corneum lipid matrix and tight junction proteins

nodes.name: Melanin Overproduction
nodes.description: Excessive melanin synthesis and transfer to keratinocytes

nodes.name: Oxidative Stress
nodes.description: Excess reactive oxygen species overwhelming antioxidant defenses

nodes.name: Microbial Dysbiosis
nodes.description: Imbalance in skin or gut microbiome favoring pathogenic organisms

nodes.name: Angiogenesis/Vascular Dysregulation
nodes.description: Abnormal blood vessel formation and vascular reactivity
